summary: Completed comprehensive final testing (iteration 98) for CrossCurrent Hub. All 13 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: Profile page notification preferences (trading + admin sections), push notification toggle, Daily Trade Summary page with stats and member lists, Trade Monitor mobile layout (LOT/Exit cards with inline icons, Dream button, sticky signal bar), Sidebar Install App menu item, and Admin Settings PWA icon upload section.
critical_code_review_comments: All notification preference endpoints (GET/PUT /api/users/notification-preferences) working correctly with trading + admin sections
Push notification system fully implemented: VAPID key endpoint (no auth), push-subscribe/unsubscribe (auth required), push-notify-all (admin only)
Daily Trade Summary endpoint returns comprehensive stats (traded, missed, did_not_trade, profit, commission)
Dynamic PWA manifest at /api/settings/manifest.json supports custom icons
did-not-trade endpoint correctly uses date query parameter
Profile page has PushNotificationToggle + NotifToggle components with proper data-testid attributes
Trade Monitor mobile: LOT Size card has inline Calculator icon (sm:hidden), Dream button inside Projected Exit card
Sidebar Install App menu item visible in user dropdown (when not running as standalone PWA)
Admin Settings branding tab has PWA App Icon upload section
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 98 completed comprehensive final testing of all features: notification preferences, push notifications, daily trade summary, PWA enhancements, mobile UI fixes. All backend APIs working correctly. Frontend components verified with proper data-testid attributes. No issues found.

verified_features.details: Returns account_value, total_deposits, total_actual_profit, total_trades, performance_rate
Returns preferences object with trading + admin sections. PUT updates preferences successfully.
Returns VAPID public key (starts with 'B') without authentication required
Saves and removes push subscriptions. Requires authentication. Upserts by endpoint.
Returns date, signal, traded[], missed[], did_not_trade[], and stats object with totals
Sends push notifications to all subscribed devices. Admin only. Returns sent/failed counts.
Returns dynamic PWA manifest with name, short_name, icons[], start_url, display
Uses date query parameter correctly. Rejects future dates. Creates did_not_trade entry.
Shows Trading Notifications (signal, pre-trade alerts, missed trade) and Admin Notifications sections
PushNotificationToggle component with data-testid='push-notification-toggle'. Shows subscription status.
Shows stats cards (traded, missed, profit, commission), signal info, traded/missed member lists
LOT Size card has inline Calculator icon (sm:hidden). Projected Exit card has Dream button inside.
Shows signal direction, product, LOT size, exit value, trade time at top of mobile view
Install App menu item found in user dropdown with data-testid='install-app-menu-item'
Branding tab has PWA App Icon section with file upload input (data-testid='pwa-icon-upload-input')
